properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You made a covenant with me, Signed by the blood that still speaks, Now I'm forgiven, I'm called righteous, I'm made clean.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: There on the cross at Calvary, You gave it all to purchase me, You are the Savior and the God, Who set me free.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Now my heart cries "This is my Redeemer" With my whole life I will give You praise, All the glory to the One Who's worthy, Because of Jesus, I have been changed.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You made a way for me to enter Into Your holy place forever, And now I am hidden, I am covered, I found peace.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Into your likeness You transform me, Making me holy, like You're holy, No longer I who live, but Christ Who lives in me.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: You bring freedom to the captives, Good news to the poor, Healing to the broken, And joy to those who mourn, You turn ashes into beauty, The ruins You restore, I am a testimony, Of the goodness of the Lord. (x2)

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Now my heart cries "This is my Redeemer" With my whole life I will give You praise, All the glory to the One Who's worthy, Because of Jesus, I have been changed, Because of Jesus, I have been changed.
